zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Lucy de Corona於1242年出生在英國爾阿德林頓時，她的父親Hugh de Corona Lord of Adlington and Little Neston22歲，母親Lady Amabilla de Bamville17歲。她於大約1278年與William de Baguley II在英國爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1317年在她的家鄉享年75歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Lucy de Corona于1242年出生在英国爾阿德林頓时，她的父亲Hugh de Corona Lord of Adlington and Little Neston22岁，母亲Lady Amabilla de Bamville17岁。她于大约1278年与William de Baguley II在英国爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1317年在她的家乡享年75岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Corona
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Jesus, Manuel, Luis, Francisco, Jorge, Rafael, Roberto, Ramon, Ricardo, Carlos.  Italian Antonio, Salvatore, Federico, Filiberto, Heriberto, Marco, Angelo, Eliseo, Fausto, Lorenzo, Lucio, Silvio.

Spanish and Italian: from corona ‘crown’ (from Latin corona ‘garland, chaplet, diadem’), perhaps applied as a topographic or habitational name referring to a house with this sign, or as a nickname for someone who had a tonsure in fulfillment of a religious vow or who had influence and power.
Italian: from the female personal name Corona, of the same derivation as 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: Lucy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old French Lucie, the vernacular form of Lucia . It is sometimes assumed that Lucy is a pet form of Lucinda , but there is no etymological justification for this assumption. It was in fairly widespread use in the Middle Ages, and increased greatly in popularity in the 18th century and again in the 1990s. In Ireland it serves as an Anglicized form of Irish Luíseach .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Lucy de Corona was born in 1242, in Adlington, Cheshire, England, her father, Hugh de Corona Lord of Adlington and Little Neston, was 22 and her mother, Lady Amabilla de Bamville, was 17. She married William de Baguley II about 1278, in Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1317, in her hometown, at the age of 75.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Lucy de Corona est née en 1242, à Adlington, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Hugh de Corona Lord of Adlington and Little Neston, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Lady Amabilla de Bamville, avait 17 ans. Elle a épousé William de Baguley II environ 1278, à Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1317, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 75 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Lucy de Corona 1242 in Adlington, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hugh de Corona Lord of Adlington and Little Neston 22 und ihre Mutter Lady Amabilla de Bamville 17. Sie hat um 1278 in Cheshire, England William de Baguley II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1317 im Alter von 75 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Lucy de Corona è nata il nel 1242 nel Adlington, Cheshire, England, sua padre, Hugh de Corona Lord of Adlington and Little Neston, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Lady Amabilla de Bamville, aveva 17 anni. Lei sposato William de Baguley II circa 1278, nel Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1317, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 75 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Lucy de Coronaが1242年にイギリスチェシュアイアアドリントンで生まれた時，父Hugh de Corona Lord of Adlington and Little Nestonは22歳，母Lady Amabilla de Bamvilleは17歳であった。約1278年にイギリスチェシュアイアでWilliam de Baguley IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1317年に故郷で75歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Lucy de Corona(이)가 1242년 영국 체실르 애들링턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugh de Corona Lord of Adlington and Little Neston(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Amabilla de Bamville(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 대략 1278년 영국 체실르에서 William de Baguley II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1317년 그녀의 고향에서 75세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Lucy de Corona nasceu em 1242, em Adlington, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Hugh de Corona Lord of Adlington and Little Neston, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Lady Amabilla de Bamville, tinha 17 anos. Ela casou-se com William de Baguley II aproximadamente 1278, em Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1317, em sua cidade natal, com 75 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Lucy de Corona родилась в 1242 г. в местности адлингтон, чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени Hugh de Corona Lord of Adlington and Little Neston было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Amabilla de Bamville, 17. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William de Baguley II около 1278 г. в местности чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1317 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 75 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Lucy de Corona nació en 1242, en Adlington, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Hugh de Corona Lord of Adlington and Little Neston, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Lady Amabilla de Bamville, tenía 17 años. Se casó con William de Baguley II aproximadamente 1278, en Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1317, en su pueblo, a la edad de 75 años.
